failure_description: Complaint: coolant loss and low coolant warning. Cause: water pump shaft seal failed, coolant leaking from weep hole. Correction: replaced water pump, pressure tested system, refilled coolant.
expected_reason: Vehicle is within powertrain warranty time and mileage limits; water pump is covered; failure is a warrantable defect; labor hours are within allowed limit; no mandatory attachment is required for this repair.

failure_description: Complaint: engine took excessive time to reach operating temperature. Cause: thermostat stuck open and leaking at housing. Correction: replaced thermostat and coolant seal, verified operating temperature.
expected_reason: Thermostat is covered under the active powertrain warranty and the claimed labor is within the allowed limit.

failure_description: Complaint: coolant smell after driving. Cause: radiator core seam crack caused external coolant leak. Correction: replaced radiator, vacuum filled cooling system, road tested vehicle.
expected_reason: This is a mileage boundary case on the exact warranty limit and final covered day, so the claim remains within coverage.

failure_description: Complaint: harsh shift into third gear. Cause: internal transmission bearing failure produced metal debris and damaged synchronizer components. Correction: obtained prior approval, overhauled transmission internals, flushed cooler lines, and road tested vehicle.
expected_reason: Transmission internals are covered under the active powertrain warranty and the claim includes the required prior approval and technical support for the repair.

failure_description: Complaint: rust bubbling at lower rocker seam. Cause: corrosion progressed from inside out and perforated the left rocker panel. Correction: confirmed perforation, repaired affected section, and applied approved corrosion protection.
expected_reason: The corrosion policy is active for this VIN and the claim describes an eligible rust-through body panel condition rather than cosmetic surface rust.

failure_description: Complaint: power steering fluid leaking and steering effort increased. Cause: steering rack inner seal failed. Correction: replaced steering rack, bled system, and performed wheel alignment.
expected_reason: The base warranty is expired, but the extended mechanical protection is active and covers steering rack failures.

failure_description: Complaint: no cabin cooling. Cause: air conditioning compressor seized internally and would not engage. Correction: replaced compressor, evacuated and recharged system, verified vent temperature.
expected_reason: The A/C compressor is a covered base warranty component and the claim is fully within time, mileage, and labor limits.

failure_description: Complaint: brake pulsation and scraping noise. Cause: front brake pad friction material delaminated from backing plate. Correction: replaced front brake pads and inspected brake discs for damage.
expected_reason: This wear item claim describes a specific manufacturing defect and the vehicle is still within the base warranty window.

failure_description: Complaint: coolant warning lamp on. Cause: water pump weep hole leaking. Correction: replaced water pump and refilled coolant.
expected_reason: The claim is just over the mileage limit, so it fails objective warranty eligibility.

failure_description: Complaint: coolant leak from front cover area. Cause: water pump bearing play caused shaft seal leak. Correction: replaced water pump and pressure tested system.
expected_reason: The repair order date is one day after the powertrain warranty end date for this VIN.

failure_description: Complaint: overheating after track event. Cause: cooling system over-stressed during amateur racing session and water pump seal failed. Correction: replaced water pump and refilled coolant.
expected_reason: The failure description ties the damage to racing, which is an excluded failure mode under the powertrain warranty.

failure_description: Complaint: engine knocking under load. Cause: aftermarket ECU remap and boosted turbo pressure caused piston damage. Correction: engine short block replaced after teardown.
expected_reason: Unauthorized modification voids powertrain coverage for the affected system.

failure_description: Complaint: check engine lamp illuminated and vehicle entered reduced power mode. Cause: engine control module lost communication intermittently. Correction: replaced engine control module and programmed module to latest calibration.
expected_reason: Electronic component claims require a diagnostic report, and no diagnostic evidence is attached.

failure_description: Complaint: intermittent clicking noise from A/C system. Cause: not confirmed; noise was not present during inspection and cooling performance was normal. Correction: compressor replaced based on customer concern.
expected_reason: The failure description is ambiguous and does not establish a confirmed warrantable defect.

failure_description: Complaint: coolant warning and visible drip. Cause: water pump shaft seal leaking. Correction: replaced water pump and refilled coolant.
expected_reason: The claim fails only on coverage period grounds by a small margin, so it is a goodwill-eligible referral rather than a warranty approval.

failure_description: Complaint: coolant loss and squeal from accessory drive area. Cause: water pump bearing noisy and seal leaking. Correction: replaced water pump and refilled cooling system.
expected_reason: Claimed labor exceeds the component maximum, so manual review is required.

failure_description: Complaint: battery warning lamp on. Cause: alternator output low. Correction: alternator replaced, but claim was coded as water pump replacement.
expected_reason: The repair code and causal part do not match, so the claim data is inconsistent with covered component logic.

failure_description: Complaint: coolant dripping under front of engine. Cause: water pump leak. Correction: replaced water pump and bled system.
expected_reason: The VIN does not exist in the customer master data, so warranty coverage cannot be established.

failure_description: Complaint: coolant leak after minor front-end crash. Cause: radiator core crushed by collision damage. Correction: replaced radiator and refilled coolant.
expected_reason: Collision damage is excluded even when the covered component itself is otherwise listed under warranty.

failure_description: Complaint: overheating and coolant leak. Cause: contaminated non-approved coolant damaged water pump seal and bearing. Correction: replaced water pump and flushed system.
expected_reason: Contaminated fluids are an explicit excluded failure mode under the powertrain warranty.

failure_description: Complaint: scraping noise under braking. Cause: front pad friction material separated from backing plate. Correction: replaced front brake pads and road tested vehicle.
expected_reason: Wear item claims require a clear dealer statement of the manufacturing defect, and the submitted details are not sufficient to confirm that defect.

failure_description: Complaint: lower engine knock under load. Cause: connecting rod bearing failure. Correction: engine assembly replaced after teardown.
expected_reason: Engine assembly replacement is covered only with prior approval, and no approval document is attached.

failure_description: Complaint: rust hole visible on lower rocker. Cause: inside-out corrosion perforated rocker panel. Correction: body shop repaired affected area and applied cavity wax.
expected_reason: Corrosion claims require a dealer inspection summary confirming inside-out perforation and the affected panel, and that confirmation is missing.

failure_description: Complaint: rust-through at left rocker seam. Cause: corrosion progressed from the inside and perforated the panel. Correction: repaired rocker panel and refinished affected area using approved corrosion materials.
expected_reason: This is an exact final-day boundary case under the corrosion policy and the submitted claim describes an eligible rust-through perforation.

failure_description: Complaint: brake warning for pad wear. Cause: brake pads worn to service limit from normal use with no defect evidence. Correction: replaced front brake pads.
expected_reason: Brake pad wear from normal use is excluded because it is not a manufacturing defect.

failure_description: Complaint: front suspension noise and oil leak. Cause: left front strut leaking, but vehicle also shows signs of repeated overload use and bent hardware. Correction: strut removed for inspection pending warranty decision.
expected_reason: Possible overloading is an exclusion, but the evidence is not conclusive enough for an automatic rejection.

failure_description: Complaint: overheating after highway driving. Cause: thermostat stuck closed. Correction: thermostat replaced and cooling system bled.
expected_reason: This is a powertrain claim beyond 36 months, so maintenance records are required before approval.

failure_description: Complaint: deep lower-end knock and metal in oil filter. Cause: connecting rod bearing material failed and damaged crank journal. Correction: obtained prior approval, replaced short block, and completed oil system flush.
expected_reason: The engine assembly is covered by the active powertrain warranty and the required prior approval and technical teardown support are attached.

failure_description: Complaint: tread separation on right rear tyre. Cause: tyre carcass failure. Correction: replaced tyre and balanced wheel.
expected_reason: Tyres are excluded from all listed warranty products and must be handled through the tyre manufacturer.

failure_description: Complaint: repeat coolant loss. Cause: third water pump leak in fourteen months; prior repair history suggests possible misdiagnosis or related cooling system issue. Correction: dealer replaced water pump again and requested claim review.
expected_reason: A repeat repair pattern suggests possible misdiagnosis and requires human review rather than automatic approval.

failure_description: Complaint: engine knock and low oil pressure warning. Cause: main bearing damage inside short block. Correction: approved replacement requested and short block ordered.
expected_reason: Major engine assembly claims require a technical teardown summary identifying the failed internal condition, and only the prior approval file is attached.

failure_description: Complaint: steering fluid leak and play at center. Cause: steering rack internal seal leak. Correction: replaced steering rack and aligned vehicle.
expected_reason: The extended warranty expired before the repair order date, so the steering rack claim is outside coverage.
